mapper.sql: SELECT SYS_SET_SN AS sysSetSn, SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MIN AS aucExtMin, SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MAX_CNT AS aucExtMaxCnt, SYS_SET_MIN_BID_UNIT AS minBidUnit, SYS_SET_TRD_CFMN_DAYS AS trdCfmnDays, SYS_SET_AUTO_CMPL_YN AS autoCmplYn, SYS_SET_MIN_CHRG_AMT AS minChrgAmt, SYS_SET_MAX_CHRG_AMT AS maxChrgAmt, SYS_SET_SVC_FEE_RATE AS svcFeeRate, SYS_SET_QUT_EXP_DAYS AS qutExpDays, SYS_SET_MNTNC_YN AS mntncYn, SYS_SET_MNTNC_BGNG_DT AS mntncBgngDt, SYS_SET_MNTNC_END_DT AS mntncEndDt, SYS_SET_EMAIL_YN AS emailYn, SYS_SET_UPDT_DT AS sysSetUpdtDt FROM SYSTEM_SETTING
mapper.select:
/* 시스템 설정: 전체 조회 (관리자 화면) */
LIMIT 1
mapper.update: /* 시스템 설정: 전체 갱신 */ UPDATE SYSTEM_SETTING SET SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MIN = #{aucExtMin}, SYS_SET_AUC_EXT_MAX_CNT = #{aucExtMaxCnt}, SYS_SET_MIN_BID_UNIT = #{minBidUnit}, SYS_SET_TRD_CFMN_DAYS = #{trdCfmnDays}, SYS_SET_AUTO_CMPL_YN = #{autoCmplYn}, SYS_SET_MIN_CHRG_AMT = #{minChrgAmt}, SYS_SET_MAX_CHRG_AMT = #{maxChrgAmt}, SYS_SET_SVC_FEE_RATE = #{svcFeeRate}, SYS_SET_QUT_EXP_DAYS = #{qutExpDays}, SYS_SET_MNTNC_YN = #{mntncYn}, SYS_SET_MNTNC_BGNG_DT = #{mntncBgngDt}, SYS_SET_MNTNC_END_DT = #{mntncEndDt}, SYS_SET_EMAIL_YN = #{emailYn} WHERE SYS_SET_SN = #{sysSetSn}
